About Us

Building Trust One Project At A Time

At Chimas Construction, we take pride in delivering high-quality construction services throughout Charlotte and surrounding communities.


From driveways and patios to retaining walls and outdoor living spaces, our team provides exceptional workmanship, honest communication, and dependable service.


(980) 293-5467

Our Services

Concrete Installation

Driveways, sidewalks, slabs, extensions, repairs and foundations.

Stamped Concrete

Decorative concrete finishes that add beauty and value to your property.

Patios

Custom patio installations for outdoor entertaining and relaxation.

Retaining Walls

Strong and attractive retaining wall solutions with proper drainage.

Pavers & Walkways

Beautiful paver patios, paths, walkways and entryways.

Demolition & Site Prep

Safe demolition and professional site preparation services.

Why Choose Us?

Experienced Team

Skilled professionals dedicated to quality workmanship.

Competitive Pricing

Affordable solutions without sacrificing quality.

Reliable Service

Projects completed on time and with attention to detail.

Customer Satisfaction

Your satisfaction is our top priority.
